h0 : n ≠ 0
h2 : Even n
⊢ (if h0 : n = 0 then [0]
    else
      if h1 : n = 1 then []
      else if Even n then 3 :: reciprocalFactors (n / 2) else n % 4 * n :: reciprocalFactors (n / 4 + 1)) =
    3 ::

      else
        if h1 : n / 2 = 1 then []
        else

          else n / 2 % 4 * (n / 2) :: reciprocalFactors (n / 2 / 4 + 1)
